title: AN ACT CREATING A CLASS "D" DISTRICT OFFICE OF THE LAND TRANSPORTATION OFFICE (LTO) IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF NABUA, PROVINCE OF CAMRINES SUR

chunks.text:
Manila Bulletin, April 22, 2025 p.7

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 12161, April 11, 2025 ]

AN ACT CREATING A CLASS "D" DISTRICT OFFICE OF THE LAND TRANSPORTATION OFFICE (LTO) IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF NABUA, PROVINCE OF CAMRINES SUR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1.

Creation.

- A regular Class "D" District Office of the Land Transportation Office is hereby created in the Municipality of Nabua, Province of Camarines Sur.

SEC. 2.

Funding.

- The Secretary of the Department of Transportation shall immediately include in the Department's program the operationalization of the LTO District Office in the Municipality of Nabua, Province of Camarines Sur, the funding of which shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 3.

Effectivity. -

This Act shall take effect after fifteen (15) days following the completion of its publication in the

Official Gazette

or in a newspaper of general circulation.

Approved,

(SGD.)

FRANCIS "CHIZ" G. ESCUDERO

(SGD.)

FERDINAND MARTIN G. ROMUALDEZ

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act, which is originated in the House of Representatives, was passed by the House of Representatives on August 9, 2023, amended by the Senate of the Philippines on December 17, 2024, and which amendment were concurred in by the House of Representatives on January 21, 2025.

(SGD.)

RENATO N. BANTUG, JR.

(SGD.)

REGINALD S. VELASCO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: APR 11 2025

(SGD.)

FERDINAND ROMUALDEZ MARCOS JR.

President of the Philippines
